title: taraxacum pseudorecurvum
intro: Taraxacum pseudorecurvum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a perennial herbaceous plant of the dandelion genus that is native to Europe. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, and has been traditionally used to treat digestive issues and kidney problems. The health benefits of Taraxacum pseudorecurvum include reducing blood pressure, improving liver function, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be taken as a remedy for various health issues.
